    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    border-style: none;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
  }
 
  .summon-iframe-hidden {
    visibility: hidden;
    pointer-events: none;
    opacity: 0;
    z-index: -999 !important;
  }
 
  .summon-iframe-contrainer {
    postion: absolute;
    width: 376px;
    height: 704px;
    border-style: none;
    background: transparent;
    border-radius: 16px;
    box-shadow: 0 0 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
    -webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
    -moz-box-shadow: 0 0 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
    z-index: 999;
  }

    display: block;

    height: 10px;
    z-index: -1;
  }
